//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// This is a WinOLS "MapProperties->Id" file.
// Do not edit while it's inside "c:\program files". Copy it to your own folder first!
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// You can use it to define the values for the Id combobox drop-down.
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Format:
//   MyId1
//   MyId2
//
//   // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
//   MyId3 // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Start editing here:
MyId1
MyId2

// My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
MyId3 // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
